productDisplayName: Reid & Taylor Men Solid Red Socks
description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into this pair of red socks from Reid and Taylor. Crafted from soft, stretchable fabric, these socks have been designed for those casual occasions. Made of a cotton-lycra blend knit fabric for all-day comfort, easy stretch and sweat-free wear Padded footbed for cushioned comfort Hand finished toe seam for abrasion-free wear Rib knit mouth for a comfortable wear Roomy toe area for superior comfort and durability sock care Machine wash cold in 40 degrees using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not iron, dry clean or tumble dry Dry in shade
